platform.name: ProAssistNG
platform.simple_description: An online marketplace where you can find and hire skilled Nigerian professionals to help with your projects.
platform.what_it_does: Connects people who need work done with professionals who can do it - quickly, safely, and easily.

for_absolute_beginners.what_is_this: Think of ProAssistNG like a digital job board or marketplace. You can hire skilled workers for specific projects.
why_use_it: All professionals are checked and trusted
Direct communication with your hired professional
Real-time support available on WhatsApp if you have questions

you_as_a_client.example: You own a small business and need a website built
what_you_do: Step 1: Browse freelancers on the platform
Step 2: Find someone whose skills match your need
Step 3: Click 'Hire' and describe your project
Step 5: They start working on your project
Step 6: You communicate with them as needed
benefits: No account needed to start browsing
Can hire for one-time projects or ongoing work

freelancers.how_they_join: They contact the platform owner and get added to the platform (no self-signup)
freelancers.how_clients_find_them: Clients browse and search for their skills

responsibilities: Add new freelancers to the platform
Read and respond to messages from clients

step_1.name: Browse & Find
step_1.what_you_do: Visit the website and look through available freelancers
you_can: See their photo and basic info

step_2.name: View Full Profile
step_2.what_you_do: Click on a freelancer to see their complete profile
what_you_see: What they charge (hourly rate or per project)
Link to their portfolio (past work samples)
step_2.you_can_also: Click 'Contact' to message them first before deciding to hire

step_3.name: Submit Hire Request
step_3.what_you_do: Click 'Hire' and fill out a simple form
the_form_asks: What's the name of your project?
What category does it fall under? (Web Dev, Design, Writing, etc.)
Describe exactly what you need done
When do you want to start?
How long will the project take?
Your budget (how much you can pay)

step_4.name: Make Payment
step_4.what_happens: You're taken to a secure payment page (Paystack)
step_4.what_you_do: Enter your payment details and confirm

step_5.name: Start Working Together
what_happens: The freelancer gets notified about the hire
They start working on your project
They keep you updated on progress

home_page.what_it_shows: The main entry page of the website
what_you_see: A big button to start browsing

browse_talents.what_it_is: The main shopping area for hiring
what_you_can_do: Click on any to see full details

includes: Portfolio with examples of their work
buttons: Contact - to send them a message
Hire - to start the hiring process

services_by_category.what_it_is: View freelancers organized by type of work

how_it_works.what_it_explains: Simple explanation of how the platform works
how_it_works.good_for: Understanding the process before you hire

contact.what_it_does: Lets you send messages to the support team

do_i_need_account.question: Do I need to create an account?
do_i_need_account.answer: No! You can browse all freelancers without logging in. You only provide your email when you submit a hire request.

is_there_a_fee.question: Is there a fee to use ProAssistNG?
is_there_a_fee.answer: No! Browsing and hiring are free. You only pay the freelancer for their work.

are_freelancers_safe.question: How do I know the freelancers are trustworthy?
are_freelancers_safe.answer: All freelancers are vetted by the admin team before being added to the platform. This means we've checked them out.

what_if_unhappy.question: What if I'm not happy with the work?
what_if_unhappy.answer: You can message the freelancer to discuss concerns. You can also contact support if there's a serious issue.

payment_security.question: Is my payment safe?
payment_security.answer: Yes! Paystack is a trusted, secure payment system. Your payment information is protected.

can_i_message_first.question: Can I talk to a freelancer before hiring them?
can_i_message_first.answer: Yes! Click 'Contact' on their profile to send a message first. Great way to ask questions.

what_payment_methods.question: What payment methods can I use?
what_payment_methods.answer: Credit card, Debit card, or Bank transfer through Paystack.

what_after_payment.question: What happens after I pay?
what_after_payment.answer: The freelancer gets notified, you both get confirmation emails, and they start working on your project.

cant_find_freelancer.question: What if I can't find a freelancer with the skills I need?
cant_find_freelancer.answer: Use the Contact form to tell the admin what you're looking for. New freelancers are added regularly.

need_help_confused.question: What should I do if I'm confused about using the platform?
need_help_confused.answer: Look for the 'Chat on WhatsApp' button on the homepage in the section that says 'Confused about how the platform works?' Click it to chat with our support team in real-time. You can also use the Contact form at /contact or email support@proassistng.com.ng

how_to_contact_support.question: How do I contact the ProAssistNG support team?
how_to_contact_support.answer: The fastest way is via WhatsApp (+234 810 805 1130) - click the button on the homepage. You can also use the Contact Us form at /contact or email support@proassistng.com.ng. Our team responds quickly to all inquiries.

example_1.scenario: I need a website for my business
steps: Find someone whose style you like
Click their profile to see rates
Fill form: 'I need an e-commerce website for my store'
Start working with your web developer!

example_2.scenario: My business needs social media help
steps: Ask them: 'Have you managed Instagram before?'
After they reply, if you like them, click 'Hire'
They start managing your social media

example_3.scenario: I need a professional logo designed
steps: Look at their portfolios to see examples
Find a designer whose style matches your brand

before_hiring: Write a clear description of what you need
Be specific about deadline and budget
Look at freelancer portfolios - see their past work
Message them first if you have questions
Check their experience level matches your needs
when_working: Stay in touch with your freelancer
after_project: Recommend them if they did good work
Hire them again for future projects
Keep their contact for future needs

payment_explained.what_is_paystack: A trusted online payment system in Nigeria
how_it_works: Your money goes to the freelancer
payment_explained.is_it_safe: Yes! Paystack is secure and trusted by thousands of businesses in Nigeria

just_browsing: Scroll down to see featured freelancers
Click profiles to see more details

have_questions: The fastest way: Click 'Chat on WhatsApp' button on homepage for real-time help
Or go to the Contact page
Or click the Contact Us link at the bottom
You'll get a response from the team

what_makes_it_different.nigerian_focus: We specialize in connecting with Nigerian freelancers and businesses
what_makes_it_different.vetted_professionals: Every freelancer is checked before appearing on the platform - not just anyone can join
what_makes_it_different.simple_process: Hire someone in just a few minutes - no complicated requirements
what_makes_it_different.secure_payments: Your money is protected with Paystack's secure payment system
what_makes_it_different.direct_communication: Talk directly to your freelancer - no middleman
what_makes_it_different.quick_startup: No lengthy registration or complex forms - start browsing immediately

whatsapp_support.description: Fastest way to get real-time help
whatsapp_support.how_to_access: Click the 'Chat on WhatsApp' button on the homepage (in the 'Confused about how the platform works?' section)
what_you_get: Help with payments, hiring, and troubleshooting

other_contact_methods: Use the 'Contact Us' form at the bottom of any page or go to /contact
contact_and_support.have_feedback: We'd love to hear your ideas - use the contact form or WhatsApp
contact_and_support.problems: Message the freelancer first, then reach out to us on WhatsApp if needed
